name: Millionaire Chicken
recipeIngredient: 24 oz Chicken breast, or 1 whole chicken
2 cups Leek tops, cut into 3-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken breasts in water.
2. Bring 2 quarts of water to a boil in a saucepan with a tight-fitting lid.
3. Add leek tops and 2 slices ginger to the boiling water; return to a boil.
4. Add whole chicken breasts, cover, and cook over high flame for 15 minutes.
5. Turn off heat and let chicken breasts cool in the water for 45 minutes, keeping the cover askew.
6. Lift the chicken breasts out of the saucepan and drain them in a strainer set over a bowl for 20-30 minutes. Refrigerate until cold.
7. Remove skin and bone from the chicken; pull meat apart into coarse shreds with fingers. Refrigerate until ready to use.
8. Shred Shantung cabbage and refrigerate.
9. In a small saucepan, mix ingredients for Sauce A.
10. In a small bowl, mix ingredients for Sauce B.
11. In a large bowl, combine chilled cabbage and chicken meat.
12. Heat Sauce A until it bubbles, then simmer for 1 minute.
13. Add Sauce B to Sauce A; pour over the chicken and cabbage just before serving.
14. Mix well and serve immediately.
All preparation, except shredding cabbage, can be done ahead of time. Cabbage can be shredded early in the day and refrigerated. Serves 4 if served alone; 8 with appetizers; 2 to 3 as an entree.
